[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: Two cartoon-like characters face each other in a close-up, separated by a small table in the background with three pale figures behind them.

Main Subject:
The image shows two similar stylized faces, one on the left and one on the right, both with thick, dark eyebrows, simplified facial features, and heads turned toward each other as if looking at one another.

Setting:
The setting appears outdoors with a bright blue sky overhead and a green ground area in the background. Behind the two main faces, there is a blue horizontal platform or barrier, and further back are three pale, human-like figures standing upright on or near a green area.

Visual Details:
The left character has an orange-tan face, a small dark opening near the mouth area, and wears a dark cap-like shape over the head with a bright blue strap or clothing edge visible along the left side. The right character also has an orange-tan face and dark eyebrows, with a dark head covering or cap shape and a bright lime-green upper garment visible. The characters are cropped tightly around the head and upper face, creating a symmetrical, close framing. Lighting is bright and even, with a slightly blurred background suggesting a low-resolution or animated still.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image is a close-up of two orange-faced cartoon characters facing each other. In the background, an outdoor scene shows a blue barrier and three pale figures standing behind them.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.

```json
{
  "nsfw": false,
  "confidence": 0,
  "label": "safe"
}
```
Gambar ini menampilkan dua karakter kartun, kemungkinan dari serial animasi "Upin & Ipin", yang sedang berhadapan. Latar belakangnya tampak seperti taman dengan pagar putih dan elemen air berwarna biru cerah, serta sebuah patung di kejauhan. Kedua karakter mengenakan peci hitam dan pakaian berwarna cerah. Ekspresi wajah mereka terlihat serius atau sedikit khawatir. Tidak ada konten yang tidak pantas atau eksplisit dalam gambar ini.
